name: California Dip Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the yeast, flour, baking soda, and egg in a bowl.
2. In a separate pan, slightly warm the cottage cheese, sour cream, sugar, butter, water, and onion soup mix until combined.
3. Place the dry mixture into the prepared bread machine pan.
4. Pour the warmed ingredients into the pan.
5. Select white bread on the machine and start the program.
6. Adjust the amount of onion soup mix to suit your taste preferences.
